_comment: Disposable e2e account for the auth happy-path journey. Not a secret: a throwaway sign-up, RLS-bounded, minted fresh each run (testing.md — throwaway sign-ups need no secrets). The journey appends a timestamp to emailLocal so re-runs never collide; the timestamp does not change the derived display name (nameFromEmail takes the first [._-]-delimited segment, always 'otto').
